title: Colourful Portals Reimagined
description: This mod adds colourful portals allowing you to travel vast distances optionally using portals from the amazing Immersive Portals mod.
body:
This mod is a reimagination of the [Colourful Portals](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291597-colourful-portals-mod-v-1-4-3) mod by Tmtravlr.  

It adds Colourful Portals that can be created by placing two (or more) classical-shaped portals (4x5) out of wool of one colour and starting one of them by having Colourful Fluid fill the frame.   
The Colourful Fluid will, once placed inside the portal flow in shape and form a Portal.  
To add the next portal of one colour remotely, simply right-click an existing Portal plane with a Colourful Fluid Bucket.

The Colourful Fluid can be placed in the world and picked up and can thus be used as decorative block. It always forms a plane, attempting to spread into the most closed-of directions first.

Portal blocks are fully configurable, by default wool can be used to form Portals.

This mod (since 0.9.4 optionally) relies on the amazing [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) mod to create see-through portals.  
Since version 0.9.4, this mod will work without Immersive Portals, just lacking the ability to see and seamlessly walk through Portals.

It aims to provide the convenience of a waystone/teleporter mod while staying immersive and adding somewhat good-looking gameplay elements.  

I'm open to feature requests/feedback.  

Please reference the Gallery for crafting recipes.
